nasb.text: “If a man strikes his male or female slave with a rod and he dies at his hand, he shall be punished.

esv.text: “When a man strikes his slave, male or female, with a rod and the slave dies under his hand, he shall be avenged.

cnv.text: “如果有人用棍打他的奴僕或婢女，以致死在他的手下，他必須受刑罰；

ccb.text: “倘若有人用棍子打他的仆婢，导致他们当场死亡，他必须受惩罚。
